scripts.workflow:inspect: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && pnpm --filter @blazebot/app exec workflow inspect runs --backend @workflow/world-postgres'
scripts.workflow:inspect:web: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && set +a && pnpm --filter @blazebot/app exec workflow inspect runs --backend @workflow/world-postgres --web'
